topics.title: SS3 Biology - Revision and Exam Preparation

subtopics.title: Comprehensive Biology Revision
common_misconceptions: SS3 has completely new topics (mostly revision of SS1-SS2)
Practical biology is not important (WAEC has Paper 3 - Practical)
subtopics.teaching_note: SS3 Biology focuses on revision and practical skills. WAEC format: Paper 1 (Obj, 50 questions, 1 hour), Paper 2 (Essay, 6 questions, 2 hours), Paper 3 (Practical, 2 questions, 1.5 hours). Practical topics: food tests, osmosis, photosynthesis, respiration, ecology (quadrat sampling), microscope work, specimens identification. Key areas: Genetics (Mendelian crosses, pedigree analysis), Ecology (pyramids, energy flow, succession), Evolution (Darwin, Lamarck, evidence). Practical tips: label diagrams clearly, state observations before conclusions, show workings for genetics problems.
